name: Alice Johnson
summary: Alice Johnson has served as Mayor of Test City since 2022. She previously worked as a city council member and urban planner before running for mayor.

career: Urban planner, Test City Planning Dept (2010–2018)

track_record.claim: Passed the 2024 Affordable Housing Ordinance, setting aside 15% of new development units as affordable.
Secured $12M federal grant for downtown infrastructure improvements in 2023.

stated_positions.position: We need to build more housing at every income level while protecting longtime residents from displacement.
I support investing in both community policing and mental health crisis response teams.

notable_news.headline: Mayor Johnson wins national award for affordable housing initiative
notable_news.summary: The National League of Cities honored Johnson's 2024 ordinance as a model for mid-size cities.

notable_news.headline: Johnson criticized over delayed downtown construction timeline
notable_news.summary: Local business owners said the federal grant project fell 8 months behind schedule, citing permitting delays under the Johnson administration.
